# carousel-maker — Full Details

**Parent:** `carousel-maker/SKILL.md`

**Auto-generated by Context Diet:** 2026-03-09

**This file contains the full specification. SKILL.md is the routing card.**


## Quick Reference

| Setting | Default |
|---------|---------|
| Model | `gemini-3-pro-image-preview` (NEVER Flash) |
| Aspect Ratio | 4:5 Portrait |
| Slides | 8-10 |
| Max Words/Slide | 15 (8-12 ideal) |
| Text Alignment | Center (both axes) |
| Output | `~/Downloads/[carousel-name]/clean/` |
| Python | `/opt/homebrew/bin/python3.13` (NEVER system Python) |

---


### Decision Tree — Full IF/ELSE Execution Logic

```
IF input_type == "video_link"
  → Run yt-dlp to download → extract transcript via Groq Whisper → set source = transcript
ELSE IF input_type == "transcript"
  → set source = transcript directly
ELSE IF input_type == "topic_or_idea"
  → set source = user_prompt, generate content from scratch
ELSE
  → BLOCK: "No valid input detected. Provide a video link, transcript, or topic."

IF source contains real person on camera OR product demo
  → set mode = "B" (screenshot-based)
ELSE IF user explicitly says "use frames" OR "use screenshots"
  → set mode = "B"
ELSE IF content is conceptual / educational / no face
  → set mode = "A" (AI-generated)
ELSE
  → INFORM user: present Mode Decision table, await selection

IF mode == "B"
  → Run ffmpeg to extract frames → select best frames → apply Pillow overlays
  → BLOCK generation until frames confirmed extracted and at least 8 frames available
ELSE IF mode == "A"
  → Build per-slide prompts → call Gemini Pro image generation → run watermark removal
  → BLOCK generation until all prompts are finalized and slide count confirmed (8-10)

IF style == "Keynote"
  → Load /keynote-generator/references/design-system.md BEFORE generating any prompts
  → BLOCK if design-system.md is unreachable
ELSE IF style == "Custom / Brand Match"
  → BLOCK until reference image is provided
  → Extract palette and typography from reference before proceeding
ELSE
  → Apply style defaults from references/styles-templates.md

IF output_dir does NOT exist
  → Create ~/Downloads/[carousel-name]/clean/ before writing any files
IF slide_word_count > 15
  → BLOCK: rewrite slide to ≤15 words before generation
IF slide_count < 8 OR slide_count > 10
  → BLOCK: adjust slide count to 8-10 range

IF all slides generated AND watermark removal complete
  → Rename files sequentially (01.png, 02.png, ...) → verify all exist
  → HANDOFF: INFORM — "X slides ready at [output_dir]. Review before posting."
ELSE
  → BLOCK: log which slides failed, retry up to 2x, then surface error to user
```


### Success Criteria (Boolean Gates)

| Criterion | Pass Condition | Fail Action |
|-----------|---------------|-------------|
| Input valid | `input_source` is non-empty AND parseable | BLOCK — surface error, request valid input |
| Mode determined | `mode` is A, B, or watermark_only | BLOCK — present mode table, await user choice |
| Slide count in range | `8 <= slide_count <= 10` | BLOCK — auto-adjust or prompt user |
| Word count per slide | `words_per_slide <= 15` | BLOCK — rewrite slide, do not generate |
| Output dir exists | Directory created before first write | AUTO-CREATE — `mkdir -p output_dir` |
| All slides generated | `len(output_files) == slide_count` | BLOCK — retry failed slides (max 2x), then INFORM |
| Watermarks removed | No Gemini watermark detected in any output (Mode A) | RE-RUN watermark removal script |
| Files sequentially named | `01.png` through `{N}.png` all present | AUTO-RENAME before handoff |
| Output verified | Each file ≥ 50KB AND is valid PNG | BLOCK — flag corrupt files |


### Execution Order with Blocking Gates

```
[GATE 1] Validate input_source → BLOCK if empty or unrecognized format
    ↓
[STEP 1] Ingest content (download video OR read transcript OR accept topic)
    ↓
[GATE 2] Confirm content ingested (transcript or topic non-empty) → BLOCK if empty
    ↓
[STEP 2] Auto-detect or confirm mode (A / B / watermark_only)
    ↓
[GATE 3] Mode confirmed → BLOCK if ambiguous, require APPROVAL
    ↓
[STEP 3] Select format + style (auto-detect or prompt user)
    ↓
[GATE 4] Style confirmed → BLOCK if Keynote without design-system.md or Custom without ref image
    ↓
[STEP 4] Generate slide script (8-10 slides, ≤15 words each)
    ↓
[GATE 5] Word count check on every slide → BLOCK any slide > 15 words, rewrite first
    ↓
[STEP 5] Execute generation pipeline (Mode A: Gemini → clean / Mode B: ffmpeg → Pillow)
    ↓
[GATE 6] Verify output_files count == slide_count → BLOCK if mismatch, retry failed slides
    ↓
[STEP 6] Watermark removal (Mode A only)
    ↓
[GATE 7] Watermarks removed → BLOCK if still detected, re-run once more
    ↓
[STEP 7] Rename files sequentially (01.png → N.png)
    ↓
[GATE 8] All files exist + valid PNG + ≥50KB → BLOCK if any corrupt
    ↓
[HANDOFF] INFORM — "X slides ready at [output_dir]"
```
